explanation: All words except 'CHAIR' contain at least one pair of identical consecutive letters.

Tornado, Hurricane, Blizzard, and Tsunami are all natural phenomena primarily related to atmospheric or oceanic activity (weather/water). An Earthquake is a geological event caused by tectonic shifts in the Earth's crust.
Four of the verbs (RELY, INSIST, FOCUS, DEPEND) are commonly followed by the preposition 'on'. 'CONSIST' is typically followed by 'of'.
